description: Linguagem Go para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui o compilador Go via pkg, gopls (language server oficial), gofmt (formatador) e Delve (debugger DAP). Suporte completo a módulos Go.

install_steps.description: Instalando o compilador Go via pkg

install_steps.command: go version 2>&1 && echo "GOROOT: $(go env GOROOT 2>/dev/null)" && echo "GOPATH: $(go env GOPATH 2>/dev/null)"

grep -qxF 'export GOPATH="$HOME/go"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export GOPATH="$HOME/go"' >> $HOME/.bashrc; grep -qxF 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/go/bin"' $HOME/.bashrc || echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/go/bin"' >> $HOME/.bashrc
export GOPATH=$HOME/go && export PATH=$PATH:$GOPATH/bin && GOFLAGS='-mod=mod' go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest 2>&1 && echo 'OK: gopls instalado' && gopls version 2>&1

config_steps.command: export GOPATH=$HOME/go && export PATH=$PATH:$GOPATH/bin && GOFLAGS='-mod=mod' go install github.com/go-delve/delve/cmd/dlv@latest 2>&1 && echo 'OK: Delve instalado' && dlv version 2>&1 || echo 'AVISO: Delve instalado, mas depuração requer permissão ptrace (root ou proot)'
export GOPATH=$HOME/go && export PATH=$PATH:$GOPATH/bin && go env GOROOT GOPATH GOOS GOARCH GOVERSION 2>&1
test -f $HOME/go/bin/gopls && echo 'gopls OK' || echo 'ERRO: gopls não encontrado em $HOME/go/bin/gopls'
